blockers.description: Prod AWS passive infrastructure, infra/aws-prod-application.json, and prod Snowflake connection do not exist (by design, D-01). Phase 2 documents these as BLOCKED rows with required-fix commands; not expected to be resolved in this phase.
blockers.workaround: Phase 2 remains document-and-validate only; BLOCKED rows + required-fix commands are the accepted output.

blockers.description: Dev DBT_SNOWFLAKE_* credentials are not available in this environment. SNOW-02's dev-target dbt validation gate is recorded as BLOCKED in evidence/snowflake.md (missing var names only, no values).
blockers.workaround: If dev credentials become available later, re-run task 02-02-02's dbt deps/compile/run/test sequence and update the evidence entry.

decisions.decision: Resync confirmed prior session's commits (c66e311, 20e9f87) already fixed all 4 plan-checker blockers and marked Phase 2 Planned/ready_to_execute; no merge/rebase needed, proceeded straight to execute-phase.
decisions.rationale: git log/worktree inspection showed both fixes already applied on workspace/go-live with the same git identity.

decisions.decision: Both 02-01-PLAN.md and 02-02-PLAN.md executed via gsd-executor in worktree isolation (USE_WORKTREES=true).
decisions.rationale: Standard execute-phase wave execution pattern for this config.

decisions.decision: At the 02-02-02 checkpoint, user explicitly confirmed dev DBT_SNOWFLAKE_* credentials are NOT set. Continuation agent recorded BLOCKED/failed evidence (D-03 compliant) and did not downgrade SNOW-02 to docs-only.
decisions.rationale: D-03 requires honest BLOCKED evidence when prerequisites fail, not a silent documentation-only downgrade.

decisions.decision: Post-merge build/test gate skipped both waves as not-applicable.
decisions.rationale: All changed files are under .planning/, no source code touched, and 02-VALIDATION.md states no test framework covers this phase's domain.

decisions.decision: Paused before execute-phase post-execution gates (code review, verification, security check) due to hitting the 75% context-critical threshold.
decisions.rationale: Avoid mid-gate context exhaustion; resume cleanly with has_summary: true for both plans so execution is not repeated.

next_action: In /Users/aneenaananth/gsd-workspaces/go-live/edgartools-platform (branch workspace/go-live, HEAD 0a2db1e), re-invoke /gsd:execute-phase 2 --ws go-live. Both plans show has_summary: true, so the orchestrator should skip task execution and proceed directly through code_review_gate -> regression_gate -> schema_drift_gate -> codebase_drift_gate -> verify_phase_goal (spawn gsd-verifier -> 02-VERIFICATION.md) -> aggregate_results (security gate check) -> final PHASE 2 COMPLETE report.
